actionCalls.description: Front half of the renewal: load + validate the Contract and its source Quote, resolve the top-level renewable assets, derive the renewal date window and name, and snapshot the account's current quote ids. Pure read/derive (no DML). Returns isSuccess=false + errorMessage on any validation failure rather than throwing, so the flow branches on the flag.
actionCalls.name: ResolveInputs
actionCalls.label: Resolve Renewal Inputs

actionCalls.description: Runs the standard Initiate Renewal core action against a Contract in the current transaction (no HTTP callout), producing a renewal Quote. renewContractId + the resolver's renewAssetIds identify the contract and the parent/Term assets to renew; renewOutputType is fixed to Quote; renewStartDate/renewEndDate come from the derived window. The new Quote id is read from this action's renewRecordId output (stored automatically) by CaptureMintedId.
actionCalls.name: InitiateRenewal
actionCalls.label: Initiate Renewal

actionCalls.description: Back half of the renewal: identify the minted renewal Quote (account-scoped pre/post id-diff, with the flow-bound id as disambiguator/fallback), re-stamp the negotiated discount + DL_FareCodes__c line fidelity from the source quote, rename to "<source> - Renewal", reset to Draft, null ContractId, set the derived EndDate, and reprice via PST. Returns the resolved renewal Quote id + account id (or isSuccess=false + errorMessage).
actionCalls.name: FinalizeRenewal
actionCalls.label: Finalize Renewal

assignments.description: Capture the standard action's minted renewal Quote id (renewRecordId, stored automatically) into a plain variable so the finalizer can consume it as a String input. Referencing the auto-stored output in-flow avoids the getVariableValue null the caller hit when reading a manually-bound core-action output parameter.
assignments.name: CaptureMintedId
assignments.label: Capture Minted Id

assignments.description: Surface the resolver's validation error (bad contract / no source quote / no renewable assets) as the flow's errorMessage output. This is a plain-variable assignment, so the Apex launcher reads it back reliably via getVariableValue.
assignments.name: SetResolveError
assignments.label: Set Resolve Error

assignments.description: Publish the finalizer's resolved renewal Quote id + account id as the flow's outputs. Plain-variable assignments so the Apex launcher reads them back reliably via getVariableValue.
assignments.name: SetOutputs
assignments.label: Set Outputs

assignments.description: Capture the flow fault message so the Apex caller can surface it.
assignments.name: SetError
assignments.label: Set Error

decisions.description: Branch on the resolver's isSuccess flag: proceed to the standard Initiate Renewal action only when input resolution succeeded; otherwise surface the resolver's error and end.
decisions.name: CheckResolveSuccess
decisions.label: Check Resolve Success

Flow.description: Delta Term Builder: headless orchestrator flow that renews a Contract's assets into a new renewal Quote IN-TRANSACTION (no HTTP callout). Flow-orchestrates-Apex (ARC pattern): ResolveInputs (apex: load/validate Contract + source Quote, resolve assets, derive window/name, snapshot account quotes) → standard Initiate Renewal core action → FinalizeRenewal (apex: identify minted quote, re-stamp discount/fare-code fidelity, rename + reset to Draft + null ContractId + set EndDate, reprice via PST). Invoked synchronously from RLM_DeltaTermBuilderController.createRenewalFromContractViaAssets via Flow.Interview. Inputs: renewContractId, renewStartDate, renewEndDate. Outputs: newQuoteId, accountId, errorMessage.
Flow.label: DL Initiate Renewal From Contract

variables.description: Output: ID of the renewal Quote's Account (the finalizer resolves QuoteAccountId ?? AccountId). Assignment-populated, so the Apex caller reads it back via getVariableValue.
variables.name: accountId

variables.description: Flow fault / validation message when the renewal fails; null on success. Output.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: Internal: the standard action's minted renewal Quote id (renewRecordId), captured for the finalizer. Not an input or output.
variables.name: mintedQuoteId

variables.description: Output: ID of the finalized renewal Quote (the finalizer's resolved id, from the account-scoped diff / flow-bound id). Assignment-populated, so the Apex caller reads it back via getVariableValue.
variables.name: newQuoteId

variables.description: Input: the Contract to renew from (renewal fields are derived from this contract for contract-created assets).
variables.name: renewContractId

variables.description: Input (optional): renewal end date; null → derive from the contract/asset.
variables.name: renewEndDate

variables.description: Input (optional): renewal start date; null → derive from the contract/asset.
variables.name: renewStartDate
